raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a specific new item from a vendor website online. However, they shipped me a different used version item. The vendor said they would resolve the issue and stalled for over 30 days, then ghosted me and hid behind their 30 day return policy. I submitted a dispute request with American Express and included supporting evidence from my transaction along with supporting documentation from XXXX ( the manufacturer of the item I ordered ). American Express has not approved my dispute request. This is simple, I ordered a specific item and the vendor shipped me a different item. American Express needs to approve my dispute request.
